title: Electric Heater 1500W, Energy Efficient Heaters for Home, Small Portable Heater Fan with Thermostat, 24H Timer, Tip-Over & Overheat Protection for Bedroom Office Indoor Use(black)
features: 2S Fast Heating for Instant Warmth. This powerful space heater utilizes an advanced 1500W Turbo-Cera PTC ceramic heater element. It rapidly warms any indoor space, making it one of the most effective space heaters for indoor use. Whether you need to quickly heat your office or living room, this unit envelops you in comforting warmth almost instantly

3 Versatile Modes for All Seasons. As one of the most adaptable heaters for home, this unit offers three distinct modes. Choose High/Low heat, and activate the 70° oscillation to spread the warmth throughout your room. The Fan Mode provides refreshing air circulation, making this heater a perfect year-round companion

Smart ECO for Low Energy Consumption. Our intelligent ECO system makes this one of the smartest energy efficient heaters available. It automatically maintains your ideal temperature, transforming it into the perfect small heater for room low energy. This technology ensures you get all the comfort of the best ceramic heaters for home low energy, without the high electricity bills

24H Timer & Whisper-Quiet Operation. The versatile 1-24 hour timer and whisper-quiet operation (<40 dB) make this the ideal bedroom heater. Schedule it to turn on before you wake up or off after you fall asleep for ultimate convenience and peace of mind

Compact & Portable Design. As a lightweight and small electric heater, this unit is easy to move anywhere. Its convenient handle and compact size make it the perfect portable heater for any room. It’s the ultimate solution for anyone looking for portable heaters for home low energy, delivering warmth exactly where you need it
